sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA No. 309 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For order on CMA No. 1851/2025 2. For hearing of Main Case 23.01.2026 Mr. Shaneel Memon, Advocate for the Applicant Learned counsel does not press this Reference Application. Dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office to place copy of this order in the captioned reference applications. Judge Judge Amjad PS
